name: Strapi
description: Strapi is an open-source, self-hosted headless CMS that provides a customizable API for managing structured content. Use this API to create, read, update, and delete content entries across user-defined content types, upload and manage media files, and introspect the available content type schemas. Note: Strapi is self-hosted, so the actual base_url depends on the deployment.

capabilities.name: entries_list
capabilities.description: List content entries for a specific collection type with filtering, sorting, pagination, field selection, and relation population.

capabilities.name: entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content entry by its document ID, including attributes and optional relation/component population.

capabilities.name: entries_create
capabilities.description: Create a new content entry for a specific collection type by providing field values matching the content type schema.

capabilities.name: entries_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing content entry by its document ID. Only provided fields are modified; omitted fields remain unchanged.

capabilities.name: entries_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a content entry by its document ID.

capabilities.name: single_type_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the document for a single type content type (e.g., homepage, site settings).

capabilities.name: single_type_update
capabilities.description: Update or create the document for a single type content type.

capabilities.name: single_type_delete
capabilities.description: Delete the document for a single type content type.

capabilities.name: media_upload
capabilities.description: Upload files (images, documents, videos) to the Strapi media library. Supports linking uploads to content entries.

capabilities.name: media_list
capabilities.description: List all uploaded files in the media library.

capabilities.name: media_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific uploaded file by its ID.

capabilities.name: media_update
capabilities.description: Update file metadata (name, alternative text, caption) for an existing upload.

capabilities.name: media_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an uploaded file from the media library by its ID.
